nodes.title:
Objective: Use AI to help you practice your creative writing skills


Why: AI should help us become better humans and encourage creativity, not do all of our writing for us. Use this template to flex your imagination.
Run this block when you're ready to generate an AI prompt to help inspire your creative writing. This prompt will focus on the themes you selected in step one.

First, explore all of the theme ideas listed below - feel free to add any of your own as well using the blank stickies. Next, drag the areas you want to focus on into the "Themes to focus on" frame. This will help the AI generate a prompt according to your mood.
Take any stickies from above that interest you in exploring today and drag them into the space below. This will ensure you get a good prompt.
Next, AI will generate a twist for your story. Re-run this prompt when you've finished up your story in step 2 so that it can use what you've written to generate a relevant new area to explore.

Use the AI generated image as inspiration to help you write. Feel free to adjust the prompt to switch up what type of image you get and hit run as many times as you would like as you write to see how your story changes the output.
Click "run" to start the AI Flow
Hey, thanks for checking out this board. Make sure to check out my other templates on the Miroverse!
